name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-30
title: list-items.py output is non-deterministic; rglob order is filesystem dependent
description: list-items.py iterates results from branch_ops.read_branch which uses Path.rglob('item.json') with no sort. Filesystem traversal order is OS- and inode-dependent, so list-items.py prints items in an unpredictable order across machines and filesystem snapshots. Determinism would help users scan output and helps test assertions. Fix: sort results by name (which encodes type and numeric ID) or by filed timestamp before printing.
